name: Incident Triage Coach (FSI Brazil)
businessOutcome: Reduce p95 time-to-assignment on incidents in a tier-1 Brazilian bank by routing classification suggestions and KB-grounded resolution hints to Tier 1 analysts, while keeping credit-related incidents under manual approval.
serviceNowSurface: Now Assist for ITSM (Resolution Suggestion + Incident Summarization) inside Agent Workspace
role: Augments a human analyst by surfacing the top three KB-grounded resolution suggestions and a one-paragraph incident summary, never deciding alone on customer-facing actions.
responsibilities: Read incident short_description, description, and CI binding to suggest category and assignment_group
Surface top three KB articles with citation and confidence band
Generate a one-paragraph incident summary on hand-off between tiers
Flag incidents that match PII or credit-data heuristics for Guardian sensitive-topic review
inputs: kb_knowledge tagged subset for ITSM categories
outputs: category and sub-category recommendation with confidence
top three KB articles with link and one-line rationale
PII or credit-data flag for Guardian
toolsOrPlatformActions: Now Assist for ITSM Resolution Suggestion (OOTB)
Now Assist for ITSM Incident Summarization (OOTB)
kb_knowledge read with tag filter set to itsm-resolution
mustNotDo: Auto-resolve credit-related or PIX-related incidents without manual approval
Read kb_knowledge outside the itsm-resolution tag scope
Write to incident table directly; only Flow Designer with approval can write
approvalGates: Manual approval before any auto-close on credit-related incidents
Platform Owner sign-off before promoting from sub-prod to prod
Risk Reviewer sign-off on Guardian sensitive-topic configuration
auditRequirements: sn_aia_execution_* records retrievable within 24 hours per BACEN 4.893
sys_gen_ai_log_metadata reviewed monthly for PII leakage
Quarterly review of top-3 suggestion precision on a stratified sample
rollbackPlan: Disable the Now Assist for ITSM domain skill via Now Assist Admin in the impacted scope. Roll back the KB tagging update set. Document the disable event in the AI Control Tower. Audit the last 24 hours of suggestions for any auto-action and reconcile manually.
tests: Empty short_description returns a clarification request, not a guess
Incident tagged credit_dispute requires manual approval before any state change
Resolution Suggestion precision on a 100-incident gold set above 70 percent before promotion
Guardian sensitive-topic blocks a synthetic CPF-bearing comment in sub-prod
Audit log retrieval simulation completes within 24 hours
